zh.lifeSummary: 當Oliver Carminow於1278年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾時，他的父親Roger Carminow39歲，母親Joanna Dinham26歲。他於1325年在英國可瓦爾被列為commissioner of array。他去世於1345年在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾博德明。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Oliver Carminow于1278年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾时，他的父亲Roger Carminow39岁，母亲Joanna Dinham26岁。他于1325年在英国可瓦爾被列为commissioner of array。他去世于1345年在他的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾博德明。

nameMeanings.name: Oliver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French name, Olivier, recorded as the name of one of Charlemagne's paladins (retainers), the close companion in arms of Roland in the Chanson de Roland. Whereas Roland is headstrong and rash, Oliver is thoughtful and cautious. Ostensibly this name derives from Late Latin olivarius ‘olive tree’ ( compare Olive ), but Charlemagne's other paladins all bear solidly Germanic names, so it is more probably an altered form of a Germanic name, perhaps distantly connected with Old Norse Óleifr ‘ancestral relic’. It has remained in more or less continuous use since the medieval period, becoming ever more popular since the 1980s.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Oliver Carminow was born in 1278, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Carminow, was 39 and his mother, Joanna Dinham, was 26. In 1325, at the age of 47, his occupation is listed as commissioner of array in Cornwall, England. He died in 1345, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Bodmin, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Oliver Carminow est né en 1278, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Carminow, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joanna Dinham, avait 26 ans. En 1325, à l’âge de 47 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est commissioner of array à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1345, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.St Mewan, Cornwall, England: St Mewan, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Oliver Carminow 1278 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Carminow 39 und seine Mutter Joanna Dinham 26. 1325, als er 47 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als commissioner of array in Cornwall, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1345 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bodmin, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Oliver Carminow è nato il nel 1278 nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Carminow, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Joanna Dinham, aveva 26 anni. Nel 1325, all'età di 47 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come commissioner of array nel Cornwall, England. Morì nel 1345, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Bodmin, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Oliver Carminowが1278年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Roger Carminowは39歳，母Joanna Dinhamは26歳であった。1325年，47歳の時，イギリスコルンワルでの職業はcommissioner of arrayと記録されている。彼は1345年に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルボドミンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Oliver Carminow(이)가 1278년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Carminow(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Dinham(은)는 26세였다. 1325년, 47세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 코른월에서 commissioner of array이었다. 그는 1345년 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 보드민에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Oliver Carminow nasceu em 1278, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Carminow, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Dinham, tinha 26 anos. Em 1325, com 47 anos, sua profissão aparece como commissioner of array em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1345, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Oliver Carminow родился в 1278 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Carminow было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Dinham, 26. В 1325 году, в возрасте 47 лет,  он работал по профессии commissioner of array в местности корнвалл, Англия. Он умер в 1345 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности бодминь, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Oliver Carminow nació en 1278, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Carminow, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Joanna Dinham, tenía 26 años. En 1325, a la edad de 47 años, su ocupación registrada era commissioner of array en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Murió en 1345, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
